creator: vrmaniac@forfree.at
text:
After Pre-Installation setup, and after the Main Binary's of FreeBSD are installed, It comes up with can not retreive a curtin Xfree86 file, and when i tried it again it does the same thing.....

How-To-Repeat: Run sysinstall, Custom installation, mark Xuser, choose base installation for xwindows, and continue on thu installation...
